name: Zekun Wang
title: PhD Student in Computer Science
bio: I'm a CS PhD student at **Georgia Tech**, advised by **Christopher MacLellan**. My research sits at the intersection of **continual learning**, **compositional structure**, and **concept learning** — asking how an AI agent (a [robotic policy](/publications/trust-region-continual-learning-as-implicit-meta-2026), a [large language model](/publications/self-consolidating-language-models-continual-kno-2026), or a [diffusion model](/publications/avoid-catastrophic-forgetting-rank-1-fisher-from-2026)) can keep accumulating new skills over a lifetime without overwriting what it already knows.
